body:
fixes #6244 

I updated [index.md] to include a new "More interop solutions" section that:

Acknowledges community packages - Points out that the Dart community has created packages for additional language interops
Lists Rust and Go interop packages - Provides links to community-built packages for:
Rust interop (using rustdart package)
Go interop (using govatar package)
Guides users to find more solutions - Encourages users to search pub.dev for other interop solutions

@parlough @conooi @antfitch  please review

reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request adds a helpful new section to the interop documentation, listing community-provided solutions for Rust and Go interoperability. This will be valuable for developers exploring options beyond the officially supported ones. My review includes a correction for a broken link to the Rust interop package. Additionally, please consider fixing the typo in the pull request title ('interlop' should be 'interop').

title: docs:added more interlop solutions
